About me

Engineer by
passion

I'm a Master's graduate in Software Engineering from Constantine, Algeria. I specialize in backend development with Django and data analysis — building systems that are scalable, maintainable, and efficient.

From designing LSTM-based intrusion detection systems for IoT networks, to building full-stack web applications — I enjoy working across the stack and learning at every level.

Currently teaching mathematics online while actively working on engineering projects and looking for my next professional opportunity in software development or data engineering.

Projects

Things I've built

01 — Security / Deep Learning
IoT Intrusion Detection System
An IDS for IoT environments that identifies cyberattacks and abnormal network behavior. Processes large-scale datasets with Apache Spark & Hadoop, trains an LSTM neural network for malicious traffic detection, and serves results through a real-time monitoring dashboard.
PythonDjango PyTorchLSTM Apache SparkHadoop
02 — Full Stack Web Application
Blood Donation Platform
A web application connecting blood donors with people in urgent need. Features user authentication, donor registration, and request management — built with a focus on accessible UI/UX and Django-powered backend logic.
DjangoHTML/CSS JavaScriptPostgreSQL
